stakeholders.Role: Committed to helping everyone bank safely and manage finances for individuals with dementia

Source metadata.extraction_context: We are proud to be working in partnership with Hong Kong Alzheimer’s Disease Association. Together we are building a more dementia-friendly community and are working towards HSBC becoming a dementia-friendly business.

stakeholders.Role: Provides support and information for individuals with dementia

Source metadata.extraction_context: This guide provides information on how we can help people living with dementia manage their finances to make best and safe use of our banking services. We are proud to be working in partnership with Hong Kong Alzheimer’s Disease Association.

Source metadata.extraction_context: The Board has overall responsibility for the formulation of DBS’ sustainability strategy...

stakeholders.Role: Leading financial services group in Asia with commitments to responsible banking and sustainability.

Source metadata.extraction_context: As part of the master plan, we have introduced a robust set of initiatives for leadership capability development. To drive leadership effectiveness, we have embedded the six transformational leadership tenets - growth mindset, psychological safety, feedback culture, courageous conversations, collaboration and decision making - into our leadership culture through our flagship managerial training, Building Great Managers.

stakeholders.Role: Partnering with DBS for networking opportunities for employees.

Source metadata.extraction_context: Acknowledging the value of building networks, we also facilitated networking opportunities for our Circle leaders and members to meet professionals from external organisations via our corporate membership in the Financial Women's Association of Singapore and partnering with the Temasek Women's Network.

stakeholders.Role: Engaged in nurturing young girls’ interest in STEM through volunteering programmes.

Source metadata.extraction_context: Our technology colleagues actively volunteered their skills and time to nurture young girls’ interest in STEM through volunteering programmes with schools and community partners like Daughters of Tomorrow and launching DBS Tech For Girls.

stakeholders.Role: Collaborate with DBS in promoting awareness of technology programs.

Source metadata.extraction_context: Our female technologists are also active mentors and mentees in inter-industry mentoring programmes such as IMDA MentorConnect which gathers women in technology across the private and public sector.

stakeholders.Role: Conducts annual reporting on performance against decarbonisation targets in accordance with NZBA guidelines.

Source metadata.extraction_context: DBS is a signatory of the industry-led, UN-convened NZBA. As part of our commitment, DBS conducts annual reporting on our performance against our decarbonisation targets in accordance with NZBA guidelines.

stakeholders.Role: Convened GFIT to improve disclosures and enhance environmental risk management practices.

Source metadata.extraction_context: DBS was the co-chair in the disclosure workstream of the MAS-convened GFIT. The taskforce comprises representatives from financial institutions, corporates, non-governmental organisations, and financial industry associations which aims to (i) develop a taxonomy; (ii) improve disclosures; ili) foster green finance solutions; and (iv) enhance environmental risk management practices of financial institutions.

stakeholders.Role: Responsible for developing a sustainability reporting roadmap for Singapore-incorporated companies.

Source metadata.extraction_context: DBS is a member of the SRAC, which was jointly set up by Singapore's Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA) and the Singapore Exchange Regulation (SGX RegCo). The committee is responsible for developing a sustainability reporting roadmap for Singapore-incorporated companies, including the adoption of the International Financial Reporting Standards’ (IFRS) sustainability standards.

stakeholders.Role: Supports various community initiatives and projects
